name: collabagent
description: CollabAgent — Full-stack AI Research Collaboration Platform

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && NODE_OPTIONS='--no-deprecation' npm run dev" "cd frontend && NODE_OPTIONS='--no-deprecation' npm start"
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && NODE_OPTIONS='--no-deprecation' npm run dev
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && NODE_OPTIONS='--no-deprecation' npm run build
